mapper.sql: SELECT rl.id, rl.user_id, u.username, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, rl.title, rl.slug, rl.description, rl.cover_image_url, rl.visibility, rl.is_featured, rl.item_count, rl.like_count, rl.view_count, rl.fork_count, rl.forked_from_id, rf.title AS forked_from_title, array_to_string(rl.tags, ',') AS tags
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_lists (user_id, title, slug, description, cover_image_url, visibility, is_featured, item_count, like_count, view_count, fork_count, forked_from_id, tags, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{visibility}, FALSE, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{forkedFromId}, #{tags}::text[], TRUE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_lists SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, visibility = #{visibility}, tags = #{tags}::text[], updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_lists SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reading_lists WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT * FROM reading_lists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND slug = #{slug} AND is_active = TRUE

, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM reading_list_likes rll WHERE rll.list_id = rl.id AND rll.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM reading_list_follows rlf WHERE rlf.list_id = rl.id AND rlf.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_followed_by_me, (rl.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_owner, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at FROM reading_lists rl JOIN users u ON u.id = rl.user_id LEFT JOIN reading_lists rf ON rf.id = rl.forked_from_id WHERE rl.id = #{listId} AND rl.is_active = TRUE

, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM reading_list_likes rll WHERE rll.list_id = rl.id AND rll.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM reading_list_follows rlf WHERE rlf.list_id = rl.id AND rlf.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_followed_by_me, (rl.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_owner, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at FROM reading_lists rl JOIN users u ON u.id = rl.user_id LEFT JOIN reading_lists rf ON rf.id = rl.forked_from_id WHERE rl.user_id = #{userId} AND rl.is_active = TRUE AND ( rl.visibility = 'public' OR rl.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} OR (rl.visibility = 'followers' AND #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND following_id = #{userId} )) ) ORDER BY rl.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

, FALSE AS is_liked_by_me, FALSE AS is_followed_by_me, FALSE AS is_owner, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at FROM reading_lists rl JOIN users u ON u.id = rl.user_id LEFT JOIN reading_lists rf ON rf.id = rl.forked_from_id WHERE rl.is_active = TRUE AND rl.visibility = 'public'
AND (rl.title ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR rl.description ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%')
AND #{tag} = ANY(rl.tags)
ORDER BY rl.like_count DESC, rl.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_lists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_lists WHERE is_active = TRUE AND visibility = 'public'
AND (title ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR description ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%')
AND #{tag} = ANY(tags)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_list_items (list_id, entity_type, entity_id, entity_slug, entity_title, entity_cover, added_by, note, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{listId}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{entitySlug}, #{entityTitle}, #{entityCover}, #{addedBy}, #{note}, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(sort_order)+1 FROM reading_list_items WHERE list_id = #{listId}), 0), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reading_list_items WHERE list_id = #{listId} AND entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reading_list_items WHERE list_id = #{listId} AND entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_list_items SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_list_items WHERE list_id = #{listId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_list_likes (list_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{listId}, #{userId}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reading_list_likes WHERE list_id = #{listId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM reading_list_likes WHERE list_id = #{listId} AND user_id = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_lists SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_lists SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_list_follows (list_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{listId}, #{userId}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reading_list_follows WHERE list_id = #{listId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM reading_list_follows WHERE list_id = #{listId} AND user_id = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_lists SET fork_count = fork_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_lists SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT rl.id, rl.title, rl.slug, rl.cover_image_url, rl.item_count, rl.like_count, array_to_string(rl.tags, ',') AS tags FROM reading_lists rl JOIN reading_list_items rli ON rli.list_id = rl.id WHERE rli.entity_type = #{entityType} AND rli.entity_id = #{entityId} AND rl.is_active = TRUE AND ( rl.visibility = 'public' OR rl.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ) ORDER BY rl.like_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM reading_lists WHERE slug = #{slug} AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(sort_order) FROM reading_list_items WHERE list_id = #{listId}
